class.name: ASPackage
class.brief_description: A reusable container for effects and cues that can be delivered.
class.description: [ASPackage] is a data container that bundles multiple [ASEffect]s and [ASCue]s together. This is primarily used by [ASDelivery] to apply a complex payload (like a fireball's damage and visual effects) to a target [ASComponent].

method.name: add_cue
method.description: Adds a direct [ASCue] resource to the package.

method.name: add_cue_tag
method.description: Adds a cue tag to be resolved by the target.

method.name: add_effect
method.description: Adds a direct [ASEffect] resource to the package.

method.name: add_effect_tag
method.description: Adds an effect tag to be resolved by the target.

method.name: clear_cues
method.description: Clears all cues from the package.

method.name: clear_effects
method.description: Clears all effects from the package.

method.name: remove_cue
method.description: Removes a direct [ASCue] resource from the package.

method.name: remove_cue_tag
method.description: Removes a cue tag from the package.

method.name: remove_effect
method.description: Removes a direct [ASEffect] resource from the package.

method.name: remove_effect_tag
method.description: Removes an effect tag from the package.

members.member: List of events dispatched to the target immediately upon package delivery.
Unique identifier tag for the package. Used for tracking and delivery logic.
